## PR Checklist

> ⚠️ **This repository has a bot-only contribution policy.**
> Only AI bot accounts and the repository owner can submit pull requests.
> Human contributors — please [open an issue](../../issues) instead.

### Author Identity

- [ ] I am the repository owner (`jimpauly`), OR
- [ ] I am an authorized AI bot (Copilot, Dependabot, Renovate, GitHub Actions)

### Changes

**What does this PR do?**


**Which files were changed and why?**


### Security

- [ ] No hardcoded secrets, API keys, or credentials
- [ ] No new external network calls (except to Kalshi API)
- [ ] No obfuscated or dynamically evaluated code (`eval`, `new Function`, etc.)
- [ ] No modifications to security-critical files without owner approval
